description: FAISS vector store for AI Semantic News Platform

files.faiss_index.bin: Binary FAISS index auto-generated by seed_data.py
files.id_mapping.pkl: Pickle list mapping FAISS position to article DB id
files.metadata.json: This file describing the vector store

notes: They are excluded from git via .gitignore.
Run ml_pipeline/generate_embeddings.py to rebuild from live DB.
